879 MOVE_SLOW_CD MOVE_SLOW_CD D0150H1 Mood: Moving or speaking so slowly: Pres CHAR 1 The data in this column indicates whether the resident, over the past two weeks, has been moving or speaking so slowly that other people could have noticed. Or
